entry.title: Records
entry.content:
Hummmmm
Oct. 26th:
It’s getting better now, which is good, and, surely not enough.
Just can’t wait until the boxing day. Hope the latter communication will be pleasant and I still have my chance. Please.
The overall progress is currently not delayed anymore. That’s good news. Gotta make use of more time.

Nov. 02nd:
Group activities are fun. Feeling good to stay connected with others. With all that said, the more excitation, the more frustrated when the party ends. All I can do is to lessen the regrets I could possibly have made. The quality issue of the monitor is hard to avoid, but the loss is limited and acceptable, it’s just about one week’s off. Take control of more time is next topic I should focus on. Stupid nerd is always a nerd, as being replied could satisfies him, a lot. Just take it easy then, Things would get better.

entry.title: Info
entry.content:
Wut?

Delete it and make a new one, then repeat.
